title: Star Wars Bump N Go D-O with Authentic Voice Kids Plush Toy Action Figure Doll
description:
This officially licensed by Disney Star Wars D-O collectible action figure plush is a must-have gift idea for Star Wars fans this holiday season. The plush is modeled after fan favorite D-O from the new Star Wars film “The Rise of Skywalker.” This plush action figure is sound activated, so when your child talks to it, D-O will spin 360 degrees and speed around, just like the movie character! Each D-O collectible plush was designed with incredible detail to ensure it looks like just the character from the movie. It stands about 8” tall, making it the perfect size for little kids as well as collectors who want to display the plush on a shelf or in a display case. This plush doll is safe for children ages 5 and up with adult supervision

  • VOICE ACTIVATED TOY – This plush action figure is sound activated, so when your child talks to it, D-O will spin 360 degrees and speed around, just like the movie character!
  • COMPACT & DETAILED DESIGN – Each D-O collectible plush was designed with incredible detail to ensure it looks like just the character from the movie. It stands about 8” tall, making it the perfect size for little kids as well as collectors who want to display the plush on a shelf or in a display case.
  • SAFE FOR CHILDREN – This plush doll is safe for children ages 5 and up with adult supervision. Young kids will love watching their favorite Star Wars droid spin and speed around during play time!
  • SPECIFICATIONS – Officially licensed by Disney for Star Wars; Material: plush; Safe for ages 5 and up; Batteries required: (3) AA, included; Sound activated; Colors: White, black and green
